REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1001 Pine Street, Unit #1001, San Francisco, California)
Off Calendar Jun-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Petitioner.

The sale was confirmed at $402,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review and receipt of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
